title: Fix Font Aliasing - Increase Edge Blur
description: The default font is showing aliasing artifacts. The MSDF (Multi-channel Signed Distance Field) font rendering needs increased edge blur/smoothing to reduce harsh aliasing on text edges.
definition-of-done: Text renders with smooth anti-aliased edges. No visible aliasing artifacts at normal viewing sizes. Visual regression tests pass.
testing-plan: 1. Manual Testing: Run application and inspect text at various sizes (12pt, 16pt, 24pt, 48pt). Compare before/after screenshots. 2. Automated Visual Regression: Run FontRenderingTest.java which includes: testFontAntiAliasing (multiple sizes 12-48px), testFontCharacterSet (full alphabet, numbers, punctuation), testFontSmallSizes (8-14px where aliasing is most visible), testFontColors (colored text edge quality), testFontLargeSizes (32-64px). The harness captures framebuffer output and performs pixel-diff comparison with configurable tolerance. 3. Regression Prevention: Baseline images stored in test/resources/visual-references/ ensure future changes don't reintroduce aliasing.
todos: [DONE] Locate font shader - sdf.fs in glsl/ folder
[DONE] Add pxRange uniform to sdf.fs (was hardcoded to 6, now uses atlas value of 4)
[DONE] Add edgeSharpness uniform for zoom-aware anti-aliasing
[DONE] Update SDFTexture.java to pass pxRange and edgeSharpness to shader
[DONE] Update Font.java to read distanceRange from atlas and pass to SDFTexture
Test with different font sizes to ensure quality
Run FontRenderingTest to establish baseline screenshots
changes-made: sdf.fs: Added pxRange uniform (default 4.0), added edgeSharpness uniform for zoom-aware softening
SDFTexture.java: Added pxRange and baseEdgeSharpness fields, setUniforms passes zoom-scaled edgeSharpness
Font.java: Reads distanceRange from atlas JSON and passes to SDFTexture.setPxRange()
